hooks.command: node -e "const i=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8');const {tool_input}=JSON.parse(i);const c=(tool_input&&tool_input.command)||'';const d=[/rm\s+-rf\s+\/(?:\s|$|etc\b|usr\b|bin\b|boot\b|var\b|home\b|root\b|sys\b|proc\b|lib\b|\*)/,/git\s+push\b[^&;|]*\b(main|master)\b[^&;|]*(--force(?:-with-lease)?|\s-f\b)/,/git\s+push\b[^&;|]*(--force(?:-with-lease)?|\s-f\b)[^&;|]*\b(main|master)\b/,/DROP\s+DATABASE\b/i,/TRUNCATE\s+TABLE\b/i,/--no-verify\b/];for(const r of d){if(r.test(c)){console.error('BLOCKED by hook: '+r);process.exit(2)}}process.exit(0)"

node -e "const i=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8');const {tool_input}=JSON.parse(i);let p=(tool_input&&(tool_input.file_path||tool_input.path))||'';p=p.replace(/\\/g,'/');const d=[/(^|\/)src\/legacy\//,/(^|\/)\.env$/,/\.env\.production\b/,/\.env\.prod\b/];for(const r of d){if(r.test(p)){console.error('WARN: edited protected path '+p)}}process.exit(0)"

node -e "const i=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8');const {prompt}=JSON.parse(i);if(/\b(commit|push|deploy|ship|release)\b/i.test(prompt||'')){console.log('REMINDER: run npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test before committing.')}process.exit(0)"
